title: Now Hiring Store Manager at PC Jeweller

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at PC Jeweller
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with PC Jeweller! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About PC Jeweller:
PC Jeweller is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PC Jeweller!
